meaning: n.滑稽的动作,古怪的姿态
examples: Toad ceased his frivolous antics at once.
Some people took the movie at face value: the zany antics of Indian college kids.
But Ford isn't the only one playing big-company antics more common among small-fry marketers.
Jim Carey's antics in Liar, Liar blared appropriately and footsteps echoed nicely in The Getaway.
